PLATEAU = 76,411 'Cards Cast', the registrar's GEMS 'SEMI-OFFICIAL ELECTION SUMMARY / Election Night Final' with all 369 of 369 precincts reporting (38.13% reg turnout). The report carries its OWN embedded data timestamp '11/05/14 00:36:57' (12:36 a.m. PT Nov 5, i.e. ~4.5 hrs after 8pm Nov 4 poll close) = the election-night-final semi-official canvass. This is the plateau (frozen until the official canvass replaces it weeks later), NOT the 8pm first tranche. Rendered from Wayback snapshot 20141115000402 (capture is Nov 15, but the embedded report data is frozen at election night 11/05/14 00:36:57). Denominator = certified Total Voters 115,547 (Precinct 31,546 + VBM 84,001), CA SoS 2014 complete Statement of Vote, Voter Participation by County. 76,411/115,547 = 66.1%. Snapshot 20141115000402 used; report data-stamp 11/05/14 00:36:57.

PLATEAU = 109,666 'Cards Cast', the registrar's GEMS 'PLACER COUNTY SEMI-OFFICIAL ELECTION SUMMARY / November 8, 2016 / FINAL' with all 363 of 363 precincts reporting (48.43% reg turnout). The report carries its OWN embedded data timestamp '11/09/16 00:29:40' (12:29 a.m. PT Nov 9, ~4.5 hrs after 8pm Nov 8 poll close) = the election-night-final semi-official canvass (the plateau, frozen until the official canvass). NOT the 8pm first tranche. Rendered from Wayback snapshot 20161113042955 (capture Nov 13; embedded report data frozen at 11/09/16 00:29:40). Later Dec captures transition to the 'OFFICIAL ELECTION SUMMARY', confirming SEMI-OFFICIAL = the election-night figure. Denominator = certified Total Voters 190,550 (Precinct 58,385 + VBM 132,165), CA SoS Voter Participation by County. 109,666/190,550 = 57.6%. Snapshot 20161113042955 used; report data-stamp 11/09/16 00:29:40. pct restated at 2dp (57.55) for dataset consistency.

113,380 'Cards Cast', the registrar's GEMS 'SEMI-OFFICIAL ELECTION SUMMARY' with all 358 of 358 precincts reporting (48.98% reg turnout). CAVEAT ON PLATEAU: unlike 2014/2016 (whose embedded report data-stamps were ~12:30 a.m. election night), this report's OWN embedded data timestamp is '11/09/18 15:15:00' (Nov 9, 3:15 p.m. PT = ~3 days after the Nov 6 poll close). It is still the pre-official-canvass SEMI-OFFICIAL figure, but the registrar regenerated it Nov 9, so it may absorb a small first batch of early-canvass VBM beyond the strict end-of-election-night plateau (i.e. a possible slight over-count of the true plateau). No actual Nov 6/7 election-night snapshot was archived (earliest /election-night-results/ capture is Nov 13). 63.8% is consistent with the midterm pattern (2014 midterm = 66.1%), so the over-count, if any, is small. Denominator = certified Total Voters 177,725 (Precinct 46,896 + VBM 130,829), CA SoS Voter Participation by County. 113,380/177,725 = 63.8%. Snapshot 20181113195233 used; report data-stamp 11/09/18 15:15:00 (hence 'secondary', not 'primary'). CORRECTION (2026-07-02 plateau adjudication): the Nov 21 Wayback capture of the same page shows Cards Cast 162,802, proving the page re-rendered with canvass data as counting proceeded; the Nov 9 15:15 render therefore likely absorbs early canvass and 113,380 is a CEILING on the unarchived election-night plateau. Flagged comparable=false (not stage-comparable).
